description: Two follow-up improvements on v0.3.0's reliability foundation: a canonical WorkStatus transition table in @tiki/shared with canTransition/assertTransition helpers that the Rust IPC and JS shim now both mirror (#103), and xterm.js search wired into each terminal leaf with a Ctrl+F overlay (#87). Issue #114 (project templates) was originally scoped to this release but deferred to a future release after a local Windows env issue blocked verification mid-session.
